texto: It [Bach's cello suites] is like a great diamond," said [Mischa] Maisky in a thick Russian accent, "with so many different cuts that reflect light in so many different ways.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Eric Siblin: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “It [Bach's cello suites] is like a great diamond," said [Mischa] Maisky in a thick Russian accent…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, bach, cello pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de cello e cello-suites.

frase_original: It [Bach's cello suites] is like a great diamond," said [Mischa] Maisky in a thick Russian accent, "with so many different cuts that reflect light in so many different ways.

texto: (regarding the prelude from suite two)... The key is minor, the three notes a tragic triad. The tones move closer and closer to a harrowing vision, weaving spiter-like, relentlessly gathering sound into thighter concentric circle that come to an abrupt stop. Nothing fills the empty space. A tiny prayer is uttered.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Eric Siblin: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “(regarding the prelude from suite two)... The key is minor, the three notes a tragic triad. The t…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sucesso, cello-suites, music pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de music.

frase_original: (regarding the prelude from suite two)... The key is minor, the three notes a tragic triad. The tones move closer and closer to a harrowing vision, weaving spiter-like, relentlessly gathering sound into thighter concentric circle that come to an abrupt stop. Nothing fills the empty space. A tiny prayer is uttered.
